{{Quote|We have more parts for more models, new and old, than any other parts dealer in the galaxy. Call us. We got what you need.|JR Yakar's e-mail advertisement|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''JR Yakar''' was the president of [[Yakar's Parts]], a company that sold new & used [[Transport/Legends|transport]] parts. During the time prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Yakar sent out an e-mail advertising the company to recipients that included [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
